summary: Multi-Phase Hardening APIs - COMPLETE SUCCESS. All 24 hardening endpoints tested and passing (100%). Observability Runtime APIs (modules/observability/hardening_router.py) - runtime metrics and alerts both working

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 24 multi-phase hardening endpoints are working. Test file covers: auth (login, me), PMS core (rooms, bookings), housekeeping (tasks), CM hardening (8 endpoints), worker hardening (4 endpoints), security hardening (5 endpoints), observability (2 endpoints). Credentials check endpoint works and returns results (demo user has admin role). Log sanitization properly masks passwords, API keys, emails, card numbers, and JWT tokens.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - returns access_token with demo@hotel.com / demo123
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info (email, tenant_id, role)
GET /api/channel-manager/runtime/status - returns health, sync_stats, drift, reconciliation, providers
GET /api/workers/queues/health - returns health, pending, processing, stuck, saturation_pct
GET /api/observability/runtime/metrics - returns sync, drift, reconciliation, queue, security metrics
GET /api/observability/runtime/alerts - returns alerts list, count=0, critical=0
